title: PHP Exception Handling
codeExample:
<?php
class ValidationException extends Exception {
    protected $field;
    
    public function __construct($message, $field = "") {
        parent::__construct($message);
        $this->field = $field;
    }
    
    public function getField() {
        return $this->field;
    }
}

function validateAge($age) {
    if ($age < 0) {
        throw new ValidationException("Age cannot be negative", "age");
    }
    if ($age > 150) {
        throw new ValidationException("Age seems unrealistic", "age");
    }
    return true;
}

// Trigger an exception
validateAge(-5);
?>

quiz.question: Which keyword is used to trigger an exception?
Which method returns the error message from an exception?
